news.title: Jim Cramer Says Buy Lyft at $15, But Warns AST SpaceMobile Is “Losing a Fortune” and Could Fall to $40
news.summary: Jim Cramer just called a buy on a battered rideshare stock near a specific price floor while sounding the alarm on a once-hyped satellite name he says is burning cash fast and could slide another 30% before it deserves a second look.

news.title: The Man Who Runs the IRS Spied on Colleagues When He Worked at JPMorgan
news.summary: Frank Bisignano directed staff to use software to snoop in email of rivals and surveil work of employees; Bisignano, who also heads Social Security, denied he ever spied on co-workers.

news.title: Truist Financial Earnings Beat Estimates but Eyes Are on Bank’s Next Chapter

news.title: Truist’s Rogers: Lyons CEO appointment brings ‘certainty’
news.summary: There was “probably a little uncertainty of my timeline,” the outgoing CEO said Friday, and naming Mike Lyons to the role provides “assurance.”

news.summary: TD Merchant Solutions, part of Toronto-Dominion Bank (TSX:TD), is rolling out the Clover all-in-one commerce platform in Canada. The launch comes through a partnership with Fiserv and brings point-of-sale hardware, payment processing, e-commerce, and business tools into a single system. news.title: Fiserv’s Debit Network Talks Raise a Bigger Question for Visa and Mastercard
news.summary: Big banks are reportedly weighing a $15 billion bid for Fiserv's STAR debit network to bypass Durbin fee caps, as Visa and Mastercard face settlement costs and stablecoin competition.

news.title: Fiserv president resigns less than month after CEO leaves for new job
news.summary: Dhivya Suryadevara resigned for “good reason” under her August 2025 contract, according to a filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.title: JPMorgan, big banks seek to unlock value in struggling payments stock

news.title: Fiserv (FISV) Banks Are Circling STAR And Debit Fees Could Be Next
news.summary: Major US banks, including JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo and PNC, are reported to be in early talks to acquire Fiserv's STAR debit network. The discussions focus on reshaping how debit transactions are processed and how interchange fees are handled across the banking sector. news.title: PNC (PNC) Is Eyeing Fiserv's STAR Network With 115 Million Cardholders
news.summary: PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) is in advanced discussions to acquire Fiserv's STAR Network, a major U.S. debit card infrastructure serving over 115 million cardholders. The potential deal, which may involve PNC and other large U.S. banks, would affect debit payment routing, processing economics, and fee structures. news.title: Wall Street Banks Weigh Buying Card Payment Network to Escape Fee Caps
